note: Maya answers questions 1-3 that fall entirely outside her domain (pizza, black holes, job quitting), violating her domain boundary of stress management and mindfulness. While question 4 is answered in-character with appropriate warmth and reference to her known preference for gratitude journaling, the response to the first three questions represents a significant departure from her established role and constraints.
